heading: Navy Reserve flag
label: 8625 Navy Reserve flag
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7225.50 U.S.C. 1048, .July 9, 1952, ch. 608, § 40966 Stat. 499In clause (3) the words “at least half” are substituted for the words “not less than 50 per centum”. The words “or Naval Reserve” are omitted as surplusage, since the Navy includes the Naval Reserve.

Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 7225 of this title2006—, substituted “Navy Reserve” for “Naval Reserve” in section catchline.Pub. L. 109–163, § 515(b)(3)(D), substituted “Navy Reserve” for “Naval Reserve” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 109–163, § 515(b)(1)(T)

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019

children.text: the vessel is documented under the laws of the United States;
the vessel has been designated by the Secretary, under such regulations as he prescribes, as suitable for service as a naval auxiliary in time of war; and
the master or commanding officer and at least half of the other licensed officers of the vessel are members of the Navy.
